title: Villmarka
description: Dette er en lett modpack, ment for å forbedre spillingen på Villmarka's server.
body:
## Phantom SMP - Official Server Modpack.
This is a light and simple modded SMP. There is no need for the mods to join our server, but it is recommended to make the game a bit more fun and enjoyable.

The Modpack Adds:

- In-game Voicechat.
- Optimization Mods.
- Essentials.

Our Discord: https://discord.gg/tGMFe4J2

Minecraft server IP: phantom.playat.ch
